reason: The page mirrors internal Admissible-Existence seed-cycle status and is not an external framework in the same sense as third-party systems. Applying the external runtime-governance benchmark would blur internal status evidence with external framework comparison.
allowed_uses: route future reconstruction fixtures through SPE if consequence binding is proposed
disallowed_uses: count as an external framework benchmark target
treat seed-cycle completion as execution authority
treat internal artifact presence as public validation
future_reclassification_gate: explicit reason to compare it as an external framework rather than internal mirror
